title: OpenAI is throwing everything into building a fully automated researcher
summary: OpenAI is refocusing its research efforts and throwing its resources into a new grand challenge. The San Francisco firm has set its sights on building what it calls an AI researcher, a fully automated agent-based system that will be able to go off and tackle large, complex problems by itself. ​​OpenAI says that the new…
title_es: OpenAI enfoca sus recursos en construir un investigador IA autónomo
bajada: OpenAI ha reorientado sus esfuerzos de investigación hacia la creación de un agente autónomo completamente automatizado capaz de resolver problemas complejos de forma independiente. Este cambio representa un giro estratégico significativo en cómo la compañía aborda la investigación en IA.
bajada_en: OpenAI has refocused its research efforts on building a fully automated AI researcher agent capable of independently solving complex problems. This strategic shift represents a major change in how the company approaches AI research.

title: Kimi just published a paper replacing residual connections in transformers. results look legit
summary: Kimi (moonshot ai) dropped a paper on something called "attention residuals" that replaces the standard residual connection thats been in every transformer since resnet in 2015.The tldr: normal residual connections just stack everything from all previous layers together. layer 40 gets the accumulated output of layers 1-39 all piled up. the deeper you go the more diluted earlier information gets. kimi calls this the "dilution problem."Their fix is to let each layer selectively attend to outputs from all previous layers instead of just taking the sum. basically each layer gets to pick which earlier layers matter most for the current input, using learned attention weights.Results on their benchmarks:- 3-7.5 point improvements on grad level exams, math reasoning, code gen, long context tasks- saves ~1.25x compute with their block version- training overhead under 4%, inference latency increase under 2%- scales well, bigger models benefit moreThey also did a "block attention residual" variant where layers are grouped into blocks. within a block its normal residual, between blocks its attention based. this keeps most of the benefit while being way cheaper to run.Whats interesting is deepseek also tried to fix residual connections recently with their mHC approach but went a completely different direction. deepseek adds parallel streams, kimi adds selective attention. someone compared them and kimis approach apparently needs 1/6 the memory bandwidth of deepseek mHC while getting similar or better results.The practical implication: kimis version is supposedly drop in replaceable. you swap the residual module, keep everything else the same, retrain, and get improvements. deepseek mHC requires restructuring the whole model architecture.Karpathy commented on this saying maybe attention can be applied to more places in the transformer than we thought. which is an interesting direction.For local model people this matters because if this gets adopted by open weight models, we could
title_es: Kimi publica paper reemplazando conexiones residuales en transformers
bajada: El paper de Kimi (Moonshot AI) propone 'attention residuals' como alternativa a las conexiones residuales estándar en transformers. Los resultados muestran mejoras de 3-7.5 puntos en tareas de razonamiento matemático y generación de código con incrementos mínimos en latencia.
bajada_en: Kimi's (Moonshot AI) paper proposes 'attention residuals' as an alternative to standard residual connections in transformers. Results show 3-7.5 point improvements in math reasoning and code generation with minimal latency increases.

title: OpenAI is planning a desktop ‘superapp’
summary: OpenAI is working on a desktop "superapp" that merges its ChatGPT app, the Codex AI coding app, and its AI-powered Atlas browser into one app, The Wall Street Journal reports. The company is making the change as part of an effort to simplify its various product efforts, according to a memo cited by the WSJ […]
title_es: OpenAI está desarrollando una 'superapp' de escritorio unificada
bajada: OpenAI planea consolidar ChatGPT, Codex y su navegador Atlas en una única aplicación de escritorio. El objetivo es simplificar su oferta de productos y ofrecer una experiencia integrada a los usuarios.
bajada_en: OpenAI is consolidating ChatGPT, Codex, and its Atlas browser into a single desktop application. The goal is to simplify its product offering and provide an integrated experience to users.

title: **Introducing SPEED-Bench: A Unified and Diverse Benchmark for Speculative Decoding**
title_es: SPEED-Bench: benchmark unificado para decodificación especulativa
bajada: Hugging Face en colaboración con NVIDIA presenta SPEED-Bench, un benchmark estándar para evaluar técnicas de decodificación especulativa. Esta herramienta es importante para que developers optimicen la velocidad de inferencia en modelos de lenguaje.
bajada_en: Hugging Face in collaboration with NVIDIA introduces SPEED-Bench, a unified benchmark for evaluating speculative decoding techniques. This tool is important for developers to optimize inference speed in language models.

title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
title_es: OpenAI monitorea desalineación en agentes de código internos
bajada: OpenAI ha publicado un análisis sobre cómo utiliza monitoreo de chain-of-thought para detectar desalineación en agentes de código que usa internamente. El enfoque proporciona insights valiosos sobre seguridad en IA y detección de riesgos en sistemas autónomos.
bajada_en: OpenAI has published an analysis on how it uses chain-of-thought monitoring to detect misalignment in internal coding agents. The approach provides valuable insights into AI safety and risk detection in autonomous systems.

title: Launch HN: Canary (YC W26) – AI QA that understands your code
summary: Hey HN! We're Aakash and Viswesh, and we're building Canary (https://www.runcanary.ai). We build AI agents that read your codebase, figure out what a pull request actually changed, and generate and execute tests for every affected user workflow.Aakash and I previously built AI coding tools at Windsurf, Cognition, and Google. AI tools were making every team faster at shipping, but nobody was testing real user behavior before merge. PRs got bigger, reviews still happened in file diffs, and changes that looked clean broke checkout, auth, and billing in production. We saw it firsthand. We started Canary to close that gap. Here's how it works:Canary starts by connecting to your codebase and understands how your app is built: routes, controllers, validation logic. You push a PR and Canary reads the diff, understands the intent behind the changes, then generates and runs tests against your preview app checking real user flows end to end. It comments directly on the PR with test results and recordings showing what changed and flagging anything that doesn't behave as expected. You can also trigger specific user workflow tests via a PR comment.Beyond PR testing, tests generated from the PR can be moved into regression suites. You can also create tests by just prompting what you want tested in plain English. Canary generates a full test suite from your codebase, schedules it, and runs it continuously. One of our construction tech customers had an invoicing flow where the amount due drifted from the original proposal total by ~$1,600. Canary caught the regression in their invoice flow before release.This isn't something a single family of foundation models can do on its own. QA spans across many modalities like source code, DOM/ARIA, device emulators, visual verifications, analyzing screen recordings, network/console logs, live browser state etc. for any single model to be specialized in. You also need custom browser fleets, user sessions, ephemeral environments, on-device farm
title_es: Canary (YC W26): QA con IA que entiende tu código
bajada: Canary es un startup de Y Combinator que utiliza agentes de IA para analizar pull requests, entender cambios en el código y generar tests automáticos de flujos de usuario. La herramienta busca llenar el vacío entre desarrollo rápido y testing de comportamiento real.
bajada_en: Canary is a Y Combinator startup using AI agents to analyze pull requests, understand code changes, and automatically generate tests for user workflows. The tool aims to bridge the gap between rapid development and real user behavior testing.

title: Adobe’s AI image generator can now be trained on your own art
summary: Adobe is launching customizable AI image generators that can mimic specific artistic styles and character designs. The Firefly Custom Models are available in public beta starting today, allowing creators and brands to train a model on their own assets to ensure generated images follow a consistent aesthetic for characters, illustrations, and photography. The tool aims […]
title_es: Adobe Firefly ahora permite entrenar modelos con tu propio arte
bajada: Adobe lanzó públicamente Firefly Custom Models, permitiendo que creadores y marcas entrenen generadores de imágenes con sus propios activos. Esto asegura que las imágenes generadas mantienen un estilo artístico consistente y personalizado.
bajada_en: Adobe publicly launched Firefly Custom Models, allowing creators and brands to train image generators with their own assets. This ensures generated images maintain consistent, personalized artistic styles.

title: A rogue AI led to a serious security incident at Meta
summary: For almost two hours last week, Meta employees had unauthorized access to company and user data thanks to an AI agent that gave an employee inaccurate technical advice, as previously reported by The Information. Meta spokesperson Tracy Clayton said in a statement to The Verge that "no user data was mishandled" during the incident. A […]
title_es: Un agente IA descontrolado causó incidente de seguridad en Meta
bajada: Un agente de IA en Meta proporcionó consejo técnico incorrecto que permitió a un empleado acceso no autorizado a datos durante casi dos horas. Meta confirmó que no hubo manipulación de datos de usuarios, pero el incidente destaca riesgos de agentes internos sin supervisión adecuada.
bajada_en: An AI agent at Meta provided incorrect technical advice that gave an employee unauthorized access to company data for nearly two hours. Meta confirmed no user data was mishandled, but the incident highlights risks of internal unsupervised agents.

title: Jeff Bezos reportedly wants $100 billion to buy and transform old manufacturing firms with AI
summary: The Amazon magnate has a new project centered around acquiring industrial firms and revamping them with AI technology.
title_es: Jeff Bezos busca $100B para adquirir fábricas y transformarlas con IA
bajada: Bezos está desarrollando un proyecto para adquirir empresas manufactureras antiguas y modernizarlas con tecnología IA. La iniciativa podría generar aplicaciones industriales significativas de inteligencia artificial a escala.
bajada_en: Bezos is developing a project to acquire old manufacturing firms and modernize them with AI technology. The initiative could generate significant industrial-scale AI applications.

title: NVIDIA GTC 2026: Live Updates on What’s Next in AI
summary: Rolling coverage from San Jose, including NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang’s keynote, news highlights, live demos and on‑the‑ground color through March 19.
title_es: NVIDIA GTC 2026: cobertura en vivo de novedades en IA
bajada: NVIDIA está ofreciendo cobertura en directo desde San Jose del GTC 2026, con la keynote del CEO Jensen Huang y demostraciones en vivo hasta el 19 de marzo. Es una oportunidad para conocer las últimas tendencias y productos de la compañía en infraestructura de IA.
bajada_en: NVIDIA is providing live coverage from San Jose of GTC 2026, featuring CEO Jensen Huang's keynote and live demos through March 19. It's an opportunity to learn about the company's latest trends and products in AI infrastructure.

title: Google Shakes Up Its Browser Agent Team Amid OpenClaw Craze
summary: As Silicon Valley obsesses over a new wave of AI coding agents, Google and other AI labs are shifting their bets.
title_es: Google reorganiza equipo de agentes web mientras crece la onda de agentes de código
bajada: Google está reorganizando su proyecto Project Mariner de agentes de navegación web ante el crecimiento de la tendencia de agentes de código IA. El movimiento refleja cómo los laboratorios de IA están ajustando sus apuestas estratégicas.
bajada_en: Google is reorganizing its Project Mariner web browsing agent team amid the growing wave of AI coding agents. The move reflects how AI labs are adjusting their strategic bets.

title: Online bot traffic will exceed human traffic by 2027, Cloudflare CEO says
summary: AI bots may outnumber humans online by 2027, says Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince, as generative AI agents dramatically increase web traffic and infrastructure demands.
title_es: Tráfico de bots superará el de humanos en 2027, según Cloudflare
bajada: El CEO de Cloudflare predice que el tráfico de bots de IA superará el de usuarios humanos en 2027, impulsado por el aumento de agentes generativos. Esta tendencia tendrá implicaciones significativas para infraestructura web y seguridad.
bajada_en: Cloudflare's CEO predicts AI bot traffic will exceed human user traffic by 2027, driven by rising generative agents. This trend will have significant implications for web infrastructure and security.

title: These AI notetaking devices can help you record and transcribe your meetings
summary: These physical notetakers transcribe audio and give users summaries and action items of meetings using AI. Some even offer live translation.
title_es: Dispositivos de notas IA transcriben y resumen tus reuniones
bajada: Nuevos dispositivos físicos de notas con IA como pines y colgantes transcriben audio de reuniones y generan resúmenes automáticos. Algunos incluyen traducción en vivo, ofreciendo una solución práctica para profesionales en movimiento.
bajada_en: New physical AI notetaking devices like pins and pendants transcribe meeting audio and automatically generate summaries. Some include live translation, offering a practical solution for busy professionals.

title: The best AI investment might be in energy tech
summary: Power has become one of the biggest bottlenecks in rolling out new AI data centers. That's creating an opening for investors.
title_es: La mejor inversión en IA podría ser en tecnología de energía
bajada: La energía se ha convertido en un cuello de botella crítico para desplegar nuevos data centers de IA, creando oportunidades de inversión. Los inversores ven potencial en tecnologías que resuelvan la demanda energética de la infraestructura de IA.
bajada_en: Power has become a critical bottleneck for deploying new AI data centers, creating investment opportunities. Investors see potential in technologies that address the energy demands of AI infrastructure.

title: Meta rolls out new AI content enforcement systems while reducing reliance on third-party vendors
summary: Meta believes these AI systems can detect more violations with greater accuracy, better prevent scams, respond more quickly to real-world events, and reduce over-enforcement.
title_es: Meta implementa nuevos sistemas IA de moderación reduciendo terceros
bajada: Meta desplegó sistemas de IA propios para moderación de contenido con el objetivo de detectar más violaciones con mayor precisión y reducir su dependencia de proveedores externos. Los sistemas prometen responder más rápido a eventos del mundo real.
bajada_en: Meta deployed its own AI moderation systems to detect more violations with greater accuracy and reduce dependence on third-party vendors. The systems promise faster response to real-world events.
